name: Record: Depth Recurrence + Multi-Order N-gram Backoff
author: naazimsnh02
blurb: Depth Recurrence (layers 4,5) for 13 virtual layers + multi-order n-gram backoff (orders 2-7, 4M buckets) with entropy-adaptive alpha blending + multi-GPU n-gram prefill. Built on PR #549 stack (LeakyReLU(0.5)², BigramHash(2048), XSA4, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, VE128, EMA+SWA, Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon, int6 GPTQ-lite + lzma).
